{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Imperial Courts
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Consultants]] do not turn traitors over to the [[Imperial Courts]] to avoid disclosing confidential assignment details.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The twelve men have been sentenced to die by the [[Imperial Courts]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We cannot turn him over to the Imperial Courts, or we would be forced to disclose confidential details about assignments in progress.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“Gardener Shera, these twelve men have been sentenced to die by the Imperial Courts.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
